title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores the mathematical concept of logarithmic transformations applied to images through the lens of Escher's Print Gallery. The video explains conformal mappings from complex analysis and how the complex logarithm function can be used to "unwind" the recursive structure of the artwork. This is grounded in the original mathematical paper by de Smit and Lenstra connecting complex analysis to Escher's print.
